mapper.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN data_type='shopping_mall' THEN '쇼핑몰' ELSE '물품' END AS type, '관급' AS dataOrigin, contract_no AS pk1, CAST(item_seq AS CHAR) AS pk2, change_seq AS pk3, vendor_name AS cmpNm, contract_name AS cntrctNm, demand_agency_name AS dminsttNm, demand_agency_region AS dminsttNmDetail, item_category_name AS midCategory, detail_item_name AS prdctClsfcNo, contract_method AS cntctCnclsMthdNm, bid_notice_no AS ntceNo, DATE_FORMAT(first_item_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstCntrctDate, first_item_contract_amount AS firstCntrctAmt, DATE_FORMAT(contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS cntrctDate, supply_amount AS thtmCntrctAmt, change_seq AS cntrctCnt, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM specific_item_flat WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437','1188119624')

SELECT CASE WHEN contract_type='construction' THEN '공사' ELSE '용역' END AS type, '관급' AS dataOrigin, contract_no AS pk1, '' AS pk2, change_seq AS pk3, vendor_name AS cmpNm, contract_name AS cntrctNm, demand_agency_name AS dminsttNm, demand_agency_region AS dminsttNmDetail, public_procurement_mid AS midCategory, public_procurement_name AS prdctClsfcNo, contract_method AS cntctCnclsMthdNm, '' AS ntceNo, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstCntrctDate, first_contract_amount AS firstCntrctAmt, DATE_FORMAT(contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS cntrctDate, total_contract_amount AS thtmCntrctAmt, change_seq AS cntrctCnt, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM market_contract_flat WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437','1188119624')

SELECT CASE WHEN data_type='shopping_mall' THEN '쇼핑몰' ELSE '물품' END AS type, '관급' AS dataOrigin, group_key AS pk1, vendor_biz_reg_no AS pk2, '' AS pk3, vendor_name AS cmpNm, contract_name AS cntrctNm, demand_agency_name AS dminsttNm, demand_agency_region AS dminsttNmDetail, item_category_name AS midCategory, detail_item_name AS prdctClsfcNo, contract_method AS cntctCnclsMthdNm, '' AS ntceNo, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstCntrctDate, initial_contract_amount AS firstCntrctAmt, DATE_FORMAT(last_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS cntrctDate, total_supply_amount AS thtmCntrctAmt, contract_count AS cntrctCnt, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM specific_item_grouped WHERE vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437','1188119624')

SELECT CASE WHEN contract_type='construction' THEN '공사' ELSE '용역' END AS type, '관급' AS dataOrigin, group_key AS pk1, vendor_biz_reg_no AS pk2, '' AS pk3, vendor_name AS cmpNm, contract_name AS cntrctNm, demand_agency_name AS dminsttNm, demand_agency_region AS dminsttNmDetail, public_procurement_mid AS midCategory, public_procurement_name AS prdctClsfcNo, contract_method AS cntctCnclsMthdNm, '' AS ntceNo, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstCntrctDate, initial_contract_amount AS firstCntrctAmt, DATE_FORMAT(last_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS cntrctDate, total_contract_amount_sum AS thtmCntrctAmt, contract_count AS cntrctCnt, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM market_contract_grouped WHERE vendor_biz_reg_no IN ('1188117437','1188119624')
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( ) u
ORDER BY cntrctDate DESC, type, pk1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(firstCntrctAmt),0) AS firstAmountTotal, COALESCE(SUM(thtmCntrctAmt),0) AS finalAmountTotal FROM ( ) u

SELECT * FROM ( ) u
ORDER BY cntrctDate DESC, type, pk1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(firstCntrctAmt),0) AS firstAmountTotal, COALESCE(SUM(thtmCntrctAmt),0) AS finalAmountTotal FROM ( ) u
SELECT DISTINCT midCategory AS mid, prdctClsfcNo AS name FROM ( ) u WHERE midCategory IS NOT NULL AND midCategory <> '' AND prdctClsfcNo IS NOT NULL AND prdctClsfcNo <> '' ORDER BY mid, name
SELECT DISTINCT cntctCnclsMthdNm FROM ( ) u WHERE cntctCnclsMthdNm IS NOT NULL AND cntctCnclsMthdNm <> '' ORDER BY cntctCnclsMthdNm
